AYUSH SINGH 
AI/ML Engineer  •  Generative AI Developer  •  Full-Stack Engineer 
Dwarka, New Delhi  |  +91 74618 79795  |  singhaayu311@gmail.com  |  Portfolio  |  CoCo Project 
 
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY 
AI/ML Engineer with 3+ years of experience building production-grade Generative AI applications, LLM-integrated systems, and 
full-stack data-driven platforms. Proficient in designing and deploying GenAI solutions using OpenAI APIs, Hugging Face models, 
and prompt engineering pipelines. Experienced with cloud AI services (Azure, AWS, GCP), backend automation using Python and

Node.js, and modern deployment workflows including CI/CD and cloud hosting. Strong track record in cross-functional 
collaboration, AI model evaluation, and translating complex business requirements into reliable AI solutions. Certified in 
Generative AI, Python, and OpenAI development; currently pursuing MCA with 9.1 CGPA. 
 
TECHNICAL SKILLS 
AI & LLM Generative AI, LLM Integration, Prompt Engineering, OpenAI API, Hugging Face, RAG 
Concepts, Chatbot Development, AI Automation, GitHub Copilot 
ML & Evaluation Deep Learning, Neural Networks, Model Evaluation, AI Pipeline Design, LLM Output

Validation, Feature Engineering, Model Serving & Deployment 
Cloud & DevOps Microsoft Azure, AWS, Google Cloud Platform, CI/CD Workflows, Netlify, Cloud Hosting, 
Docker (Conceptual) 
Programming Python, JavaScript, Node.js, SQL, Solidity, React.js, HTML/CSS, REST APIs 
Data & Analytics SQL Reporting, Power BI, Excel Dashboards, Data Preprocessing, ETL Concepts, Data Integrity 
Auditing, MongoDB 
Tools Git, VS Code, iServe, MS Teams, MS Office Suite, Apache Tomcat, Anti-gravity, Cursor 
 
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE 
System Engineer (AI/ML)  |  Infosys Limited  |  Nov 2022 – Present  |  Delhi, India 
• Developed and integrated Generative AI solutions using OpenAI API and Hugging Face models, evaluating LLM outputs and 
improving AI response quality through structured prompt engineering workflows. 
• Engineered backend automation systems using Python and Node.js, improving internal workflow efficiency and supporting 
enterprise application deployments and infrastructure operations.

enterprise application deployments and infrastructure operations. 
• Built AI-powered applications incorporating NLP and chatbot capabilities, aligning with deep learning and neural network 
use cases in line with production-quality AI/ML standards. 
• Participated in Generative AI evaluation pipelines, validating model accuracy, identifying hallucination patterns, and ensuring 
outputs met reliability and quality benchmarks. 
• Developed operational dashboards and reporting frameworks using Power BI and Excel, enabling leadership teams to 
monitor AI delivery metrics and operational KPIs.

monitor AI delivery metrics and operational KPIs. 
• Conducted internal and external data audits to validate data integrity, ensure process compliance, and present corrective 
actions to cross-functional stakeholders. 
• Utilized iServe for operational reporting, incident tracking, and service request management — supporting performance 
monitoring across global delivery teams. 
• Supported middleware deployment and maintenance of Java applications on Apache Tomcat, contributing to cloud and 
on-prem production infrastructure. 
 
AI PROJECTS

on-prem production infrastructure. 
 
AI PROJECTS 
CoCo — AI Agent & SaaS Marketplace  |  https://coco17.netlify.app/ 
• Designed and deployed a full-stack AI SaaS marketplace enabling developers to publish, discover, and integrate AI agents — 
leveraging OpenAI and Hugging Face APIs for intelligent service automation.

• Built production-grade backend APIs using Node.js for agent management, service listings, marketplace workflows, and AI 
plugin integration. 
• Applied Generative AI APIs to power autonomous agent capabilities, chatbot features, and real-time AI service discovery 
within the platform. 
• Built a scalable React.js + Tailwind CSS frontend optimized for AI product discovery, usability, and developer monetization 
workflows. 
• Deployed via Netlify CI/CD pipelines; platform architecture supports future AI plugin ecosystems — demonstrating 
end-to-end GenAI application delivery.

end-to-end GenAI application delivery. 
AI-Powered Conversational Chatbot (LLM + Voice Interface) 
Stack: Hugging Face (Zephyr-7B-Beta), Prompt Engineering, Web Speech API, JavaScript, Netlify Serverless, REST APIs 
• Deployed a production-ready conversational AI chatbot using the Zephyr-7B-Beta LLM from Hugging Face with advanced 
prompt engineering for hallucination-free, context-aware responses. 
• Integrated Web Speech API (speech-to-text + text-to-speech) to deliver a multi-modal AI interface, showcasing deep learning 
model deployment and real-world NLP application.

model deployment and real-world NLP application. 
• Built a serverless backend with conversation history management, REST APIs, and intelligent fallback handling — achieving 
sub-second response latency. 
Crypto Wallet — Ethereum Blockchain dApp  |  https://cryptowallet17.netlify.app/ 
• Developed a decentralized crypto wallet enabling secure peer-to-peer Ethereum transactions using Solidity smart contracts 
and Web3 libraries. 
• Built Node.js backend services and a responsive React.js UI with wallet authentication, balance tracking, and transaction 
history.

history. 
• Deployed production-ready blockchain application demonstrating smart contract integration and full-stack engineering. 
 
EDUCATION 
MCA (Master of Computer Applications)  |  SRM University, Chennai  |  2023 – 2025  |  CGPA: 9.1/10 
BCA (Bachelor of Computer Applications)  |  Amity University, Patna  |  2019 – 2022  |  CGPA: 8.32/10 
 
CERTIFICATIONS 
• OpenAI API Developer — Infosys 
• Generative AI Professional Developer — Infosys 
• Python Developer — Infosys 
• Data Consultant — Infosys

Ayush Singh — Portfolio Projects:
1. CoCo AI Agent & SaaS Marketplace — AI agent platform built with React, Node.js, LLM integration. Live: https://neuromarket17.netlify.app
2. Crypto Wallet (Ethereum) — Decentralized wallet using React, Three.js, Solidity smart contracts. Live: https://cryptowallet17.netlify.app
3. Portfolio Website — Interactive 3D portfolio with AI chatbot powered by Gemini RAG. Live: https://ayushsingh17.netlify.app
4. LLM Chatbot with Voice Interface — Built using Zephyr-7B-Beta, includes voice I/O.

Professional Summary:
- AI/ML Engineer at Infosys with 3+ years of experience.
- Specialises in Generative AI, RAG pipelines, LLM integration, prompt engineering.
- Backend experience: Python, Node.js, REST APIs.
- Cloud: Azure, AWS, GCP.
- Completing MCA at SRM University.
- Certifications: Infosys Generative AI, OpenAI API Development, Python.
- Contact: singhaayu311@gmail.com
